description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI of mc_rtc with Docker that checks the build-and-install script on base Docker images. The workflow should trigger on push to all branches except when changes are made to specific files, and on pull requests to all branches. Use a job matrix to build and test on debian:buster and ubuntu:focal base images, checking out the repository, building a Docker image, and running the build_and_install.sh script within the Docker container. Send a Slack notification if the job fails.
